name: Percuteur Tellurique
description: Foreur blindé dont la tête de roche compacte pulvérise les fortifications souterraines. Avance comme un bélier vivant, laissant des tunnels effondrés derrière lui.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, massive drilling rock creature with a conical armored head of dark basalt, burrowing through underground fortress walls, debris flying, glowing magma veins, dust clouds, cinematic lighting
